overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy navigating a sunlit desert city with Middle Eastern-inspired sandstone architecture. The character ascends stairs, traverses a busy plaza, and emerges onto a circular observation platform overlooking a distant glowing tower.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a courtyard featuring a prominent monster skull shrine over a doorway. The character follows an NPC guide up a wide stone staircase, with sandstone walls visible on either side.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a bright open plaza, the character walks past a large building with prominent wooden balconies. Several NPCs are scattered throughout the area, walking in various directions across the cobblestone ground.

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a quieter side street flanked by wooden carts and barricades. Palm trees are visible in the distance as the character approaches a large ornate stone archway.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone archway tunnel with intricately carved walls. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character approaches the bright exit at the far end of the corridor.

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a vast circular observation platform, the character approaches a circle of robed figures standing before a stunning vista. A tall glowing tower rises in the distance against a bright sky, with ornate stone railings lining the platform edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded sandstone courtyard through a bustling desert city and into a grand open-air vista. It begins by following a guide past a monster skull shrine and up a wide stone staircase, emerging from the enclosure into a bright, open plaza filled with NPCs and buildings featuring wooden balconies. The camera then turns away from the crowd onto a quieter side street lined with wooden carts and palm trees before passing through a large, ornate stone archway. As the character moves through the dark, intricately carved tunnel, the lighting shifts dramatically toward a bright exit at the far end. Finally, the scene opens onto a vast circular observation platform where robed figures stand before a stunning view of a tall glowing tower rising against the bright sky.
